dashboard.title: Weather Dashboard
dashboard.forecastUpdates: Automatic updates every 30 minutes from NOAA

hurricane.title: Hurricane Tracking
hurricane.noActive: No active tropical systems at this time.
hurricane.seasonInfo: Hurricane season in the Atlantic runs from June 1 to November 30.
hurricane.autoFetch: Data is automatically fetched from the National Hurricane Center every hour during hurricane season.
